'''Irfan''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Vaxal system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] orbited by seven [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Irfan was named after the son of one of [[Gary Astleford]]'s friends.<ref name="Irfan">{{WebCite|url=https://hishgraphics.com/irfan-as-a-star-wars-planet|text=Irfan As A Star Wars Planet|archivedate=20220527115648}}</ref>
